title: GearSwap
description: Save and instantly swap complete equipment setups — hotbar, armor, and offhand. One key, one click.
body:
# GearSwap

  Tired of rearranging your hotbar every time you switch tasks? Loadouts lets you save your complete equipment setup — hotbar, armor, and offhand — and restore it in one click.

  ## Features

  ### Save Any Setup
  Capture your current hotbar (9 slots), armor (4 slots), and offhand as a named loadout with a custom icon. Loadouts are stored per-world or globally across all worlds.

  ### Load in One Click
  Open the loadout screen with **L**, select a loadout, and hit Load. Items are moved using standard inventory clicks — fully compatible with vanilla servers, Realms, and multiplayer.

  ### Radial Quick-Switch Menu
  Hold **L** to open a radial wheel showing all your loadouts. Move your mouse to the one you want and release to apply it instantly — no menus needed.

  ### Direct Hotkeys
  Bind loadouts to **L + 1–9** for instant one-handed switching without opening any screen.

  ### Smart Item Matching
  Loadouts find your items wherever they are in your inventory. Choose simple matching (any matching item) or exact matching (same enchantments and custom name).

  ### Toast Notifications
  Get a clean slide-in notification when a loadout is applied, including which items couldn't be found.

  ## Controls

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | L (tap) | Open loadout management screen |
  | L (hold) | Open radial quick-switch menu |
  | L + 1–9 | Apply loadout bound to that number |

  ## Configuration

  Config file: `config/loadouts/settings.json`

  Options include click delay (for anti-cheat compatibility), radial menu opacity, max loadouts per world/global, and whether to close the screen after loading.

  ## Compatibility

  - **Client-side only** — works on any server including vanilla and Realms
  - **Fabric 0.18.4+** for Minecraft 1.21.11
  - Requires **Fabric API**
